title: Lead Investment Banker at Motilal Oswal

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Motilal Oswal
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
